heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 40111 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The corporation is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4011136:2609., , .Aug. 17, 1984Pub. L. 98–382, § 998 Stat. 1345
